title: Counselor Enrollment & Delivery Checklist
subtitle: Coaching · IELTS Academic · Regular batch with books
footerTagline: Future Link Consultants | 25+ Years in Study Abroad & Test Prep | IELTS · PTE · GRE · GMAT · German · French · Spoken English
policyBanner: Confirm current band vs target band before enrollment. Academic module only (not General Training). Books included in fee — issue on Day 1. Exam fee is separate (paid to IDP IELTS India on ieltsidpindia.com). Never guarantee a band score.

items.title: Diagnostic test completed (or prior IELTS score reviewed)
items.note: Record L/R/W/S breakdown. Set realistic target band and timeline with student.

items.title: Academic module confirmed (not General Training)
items.note: Student visa / university applications require Academic. GT is a different prep path.

items.title: Target band, exam window, and study hours agreed in writing
Client service agreement / enrollment form signed
Course fee collected; receipt issued (separate from exam fee)
Batch assigned — schedule shared (days, times, mode)
Course books / materials issued and logged on file
items.note: Regular with books — track book numbers if applicable.

items.title: LMS / portal access created (if applicable)
Trainer introduced; escalation path explained
Attendance tracked — counselor reviews dips below 80%
Homework / writing tasks submitted on schedule
Speaking mock sessions completed per syllabus
Writing tasks marked with band-style feedback
Mid-course progress review with student (adjust plan if needed)
Minimum full mock tests completed (per course standard — e.g. 4)
Mock scores within 0.5 band of target on two consecutive mocks
items.note: Do not push exam booking if student is not exam-ready.

items.title: Exam registration guidance provided (BC / IDP — student pays directly)
Test day checklist shared (ID, timing, location, speaking slot)
Actual IELTS score collected and filed on client record
Target met — close file or hand off to admissions / visa team
Retake / booster batch recommended if below target
items.note: Document gap analysis (weakest skill) before re-enrollment.

items.title: Student feedback / testimonial requested (if satisfied)
